mapper.select: SELECT ff.id, ff.tenant_code, ff.busness_type, ff.file_size, ff.file_name, ff.file_type, ff.oss_sp, ff.bucket, ff.file_id, ff.sort, ff.create_time, ff.create_by, ff.update_time, ff.update_by, ff.remark, ff.version FROM mdm_fs_files ff WHERE deleted = 0 AND ff.create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND ff.create_time <= #{timeTo} AND ff.id = #{id} AND ff.tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND ff.busness_type = #{busnessType} AND ff.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%') AND ff.file_type = #{fileType} AND ff.oss_sp = #{ossSp} AND ff.bucket = #{bucket} AND ff.file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, tenant_code, busness_type, file_size, file_name, file_type, oss_sp, bucket, file_id FROM mdm_fs_files WHERE deleted = 0 AND file_id = #{fileId}
SELECT id, tenant_code, busness_type, file_size, file_name, file_type, oss_sp, bucket, file_id FROM mdm_fs_files WHERE deleted = 0 AND file_id IN ( #{item} )
